name: Shelk
street_level_visibility: Elves remain primary, with Half-Elves, Humans, Gnomes, and Firbolgs retained as the best-supported extension of Shelk’s urban, artistic, and nature-linked identity.
visitor_signal: Visitors to Shelk should perceive the dominant populations first and the secondary populations as stable but not polity-defining unless narrower locality canon states otherwise.
runtime_rule: Runtime narration may elaborate visible population mix but may not contradict canonical roster or exclusions.
